hooks.command: cat | curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/hooks/permission -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- 2>/dev/null || true
cat | curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/hooks/activity -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- 2>/dev/null || true
cat | curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/hooks/notification -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- 2>/dev/null || true
cat | curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/hooks/stop -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- 2>/dev/null || true
